overall.description: A first-person exploration of a cyberpunk apartment interior from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves through a neon-lit bedroom with red and purple lighting, past an arcade machine and bed, then enters a small bathroom through a beaded curtain doorway. The atmosphere is dark and moody with artificial neon illumination throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with neon arcade corner

agents.ego_description: slowly walking through the apartment main room from the entrance area toward the bed and arcade machine, observing the neon-lit decor

entered.detail: retro-style arcade cabinet with glowing neon edges and screen
unmade bed with pillows and blankets positioned against the back wall
rotating ceiling fan with lights mounted on the ceiling
wall shelves with purple neon lighting displaying various objects
large window with horizontal blinds showing city lights outside
small wooden table with lit candles and a bottle on top
closed wooden door with metallic handle on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom illuminated by red and purple neon lights. The camera moves slowly from the right side of the room toward the center, revealing a retro arcade machine on the left, an unmade bed in the center, and a window with blinds showing the night city outside. A small table with candles sits near the entrance area.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between bedroom and bathroom entrance

events.description: approaching and passing through the beaded curtain doorway leading to the bathroom

agents.ego_description: turning toward the bathroom entrance and moving through the beaded curtain doorway

entered.detail: doorway covered with hanging beaded strings separating the bedroom from bathroom
large poster with red graphics mounted on the wall near the bathroom entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the right side of the room and approaches a beaded curtain doorway. The bed and window move to the left side of the frame as the perspective shifts toward the bathroom entrance. A poster with red graphics becomes visible on the wall next to the beaded curtain as the camera prepares to enter the adjacent room.

scene_state.functional_zone: small bathroom with toilet and sink

events.description: lighting shifts from red-purple neon to greenish fluorescent bathroom lighting
game UI interaction prompt appears offering to flush the toilet

agents.ego_description: examining the bathroom fixtures including the toilet, sink, and shower area, with interaction prompts appearing

entered.detail: white ceramic toilet with the lid up, positioned against the left wall
white pedestal sink with faucet and toiletries on the shelf above
rectangular mirror with fluorescent lighting above the sink
shower stall with fixtures and controls visible on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the beaded curtain into a small bathroom with greenish fluorescent lighting. The toilet is visible on the left, a sink with a mirror in the center, and a shower area on the right. The lighting is dimmer and more utilitarian compared to the neon-lit bedroom. A game UI prompt appears near the toilet offering an interaction option.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, neon-lit cyberpunk bedroom that transitions into a utilitarian, dimly lit bathroom. It begins by gliding from the right side of the room toward the center, passing a retro arcade machine and an unmade bed under a glow of red and purple light. As the perspective shifts, the camera turns right toward a beaded curtain doorway, leaving the window and bed behind while a red graphic poster comes into view on the wall. The scene then moves through the curtain, shifting abruptly from vibrant neon tones to a cold, greenish fluorescent light. Finally, the camera enters the small bathroom, revealing a toilet, sink, and shower area as a game UI interaction prompt appears.
